---
title: "Elizabeth Maud Guinness"
---

## Elizabeth Maud Guinness

**Dates:** (1868/9-1860)

### Description

headmistress, daughter of the Rev. Robert Guinness and Grace Harriet Butler

### Biography

[LG 1952 Guinness of Wootton Hall, <i>Guinness Family</i>; 1891 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
